differential_diagnoses: Congenital pulmonary airway malformation (CPAM) with post-obstructive pneumonia
next_steps: Perform contrast-enhanced computed tomography (CT) of the chest to delineate anatomy and vascular supply
Obtain tracheal aspirate for gram stain, bacterial, fungal, and viral cultures
Review blood culture results from prior septic episodes
Perform bronchoscopy to exclude endobronchial obstruction or anatomical anomalies
Serial clinical monitoring for potential surgical intervention if sequestration or CPAM is confirmed
